com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager

Interface IXBridgeProcessor

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXFunctionBridgeProcessor, IXHarnessBridgeProcessor, IXIntegratorBridgeProcessor, IXLogicBridgeProcessor, IXTopologyBridgeProcessor

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXBridgeProcessor
extends IXPlugin
    This plugin is used to additionally process data while doing bridgeIn or bridgeOut. This interface is extended by IXIntegratorBridgeProcessor, IXLogicBridgeProcessor and IXHarnessBridgeProcessor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void processBridgeIn(java.lang.Object x2mlContainer, IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
      Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge In
      void processBridgeOut(java.lang.Object x2mlContainer, IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
      Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge Out

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • processBridgeIn

        void processBridgeIn(java.lang.Object x2mlContainer,
                     IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
        Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge In
        Parameters:
        x2mlContainer - X2ML container created during import to application. It can be either { chs.bridges.x2ml.WiringDesign} if it is a wiring bridge or {chs.bridges.x2ml.harness.Harness} if it is a harness bridge
        applicationContext - the application context. From this object, the current "bridge context" IXBridgeContext may be obtained. Also, the current design, project and currently selected objects may be obtained.

      • processBridgeOut

        void processBridgeOut(java.lang.Object x2mlContainer,
                      IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
        Given an x2ml container instance, this method is called to allow any type of modification of this container so that these changes are considered during Bridge Out
        Parameters:
        x2mlContainer - X2ML container created during export from application. It can be either { chs.bridges.x2ml.WiringDesign} if it is a wiring bridge or {chs.bridges.x2ml.harness.Harness} if it is a harness bridge
        applicationContext - the application context. From this object, the current "bridge context" IXBridgeContext may be obtained. Also, the current design, project and currently selected objects may be obtained.
